name: Mihir Sharma
tagline: Senior Full-Stack & Mobile Engineer with 5+ years of expertise in architecting, developing, and deploying high-performance web and cross-platform mobile applications.
about: A seasoned Senior Full-Stack & Mobile Engineer with over 5 years of dedicated experience, specializing in architecting, developing, and deploying robust full-stack web and cross-platform mobile applications. Proven expertise in translating complex UI/UX designs into high-performance digital solutions across diverse sectors, including real-time operational hospitality dashboards, corporate healthcare SaaS platforms, and premium luxury e-commerce experiences. Adept at leveraging modern engineering standards to drive product quality, reduce user churn, and enhance interface responsiveness.
currentRole: Senior Software Engineer at Enterprise Technology Solutions Studio

projects.name: Zenflow - Clinical Workflow & Provider Management Dashboard
projects.description: Architected a comprehensive SaaS dashboard for healthcare provider management, designed to optimize clinical workflow efficiency and practitioner coordination. Engineered a low-latency, dynamic weekly scheduling calendar grid that effectively manages simultaneous multi-practitioner time slots and real-time appointment statuses (Ongoing, Pending, Cancelled). Integrated secure operational metrics tables, modular analytics panels, and detailed partner/corporate client views to monitor overall practitioner utilization and performance.

projects.name: Solitare - Premium Headless E-Commerce Jewelry Platform
projects.description: Developed a high-performance, responsive headless e-commerce interface optimized for media-rich luxury catalog interaction and brand discovery. Implemented advanced localized category filters (Bangles, Necklaces, Rings, etc.), persistent client-side states, high-fidelity item grids, and intuitive customer favorites/wishlist functionalities. Optimized modern asset delivery networks and lazy-loading mechanisms, achieving a notable 35% improvement in First Contentful Paint (FCP) across high-resolution product showcase nodes.

projects.name: Pizza – Real-Time Hospitality Outlet Management Application
projects.description: Engineered a tablet-optimized real-time outlet operations and layout management dashboard, specifically designed to minimize operational friction in high-volume dining environments. Developed an interactive live floor-plan manager leveraging persistent state updates to accurately map table statuses (Vacant, Occupied, Overdue) and integrate automated alert systems. Established a centralized telemetry pipeline displaying key performance metrics (Average Table Turnaround Time and Average Queue Time), which successfully lowered seating friction intervals by 18%.

projects.name: Trinity – Personalized Mental Health & Wellness Mobile Application
projects.description: Designed and developed a user-centric cross-platform mobile application focused on mental well-being, behavioral habits, and telehealth access. Implemented a highly interactive daily mood journaling module featuring specialized feedback components and micro-interactions, which elevated user retention metrics by 22%. Established encrypted synchronization endpoints to ensure secure user data transmission, facilitate self-assessments, and streamline clinical consultation appointment booking.
